title: Permutation Learning & Encoding
learningObjectives: Formulate sorting as permutation matrix learning and explain why hard permutation matrices are non-differentiable.
Compare Gumbel-Sinkhorn, matrix factorization, SoftSort, and ShuffleSoftSort on quality, memory, and normalization cost.
Implement scalar quantization for each 3DGS attribute category and estimate achievable bit-rate reductions.
Explain vector quantization, sensitivity-aware VQ, and rate-distortion optimized VQ (RDOGaussian).
Trace the full SOG pipeline (quantize → sort → compress with image codec) and interpret the ~22× compression result.

readings.title: Neural Permutation Learning: From Gumbel-Sinkhorn to ShuffleSoftSort
Quantization and Vector Quantization for Gaussian Attributes
The SOG Encoding Pipeline and KISS-GS

quizzes.title: Encoding Strategies and the SOG Pipeline

lab.title: SOG Encoding Pipeline: Quantize, Sort, Compress
